### lattice-spacing-4mm [OUT]
Lattice spacing a_0 ~ 4 mm

- Assumes: depression-depth-equals-lattice-spacing

### lattice-spacing-correction [IN]
a_0 ~ 4 mm is depression depth, not lattice spacing; actual a_0 has three scenarios
- Source: physics-speculation/entries/2025/02/18/lattice-spacing-correction.md
- Date: 2025-02-18
- Assumes: depression-depth-distinct-from-lattice-spacing

### surface-tilt-derivation [OUT]
Infall velocity v_r = sqrt(2GM/r) follows from surface tilt geometry
- Source: physics-publisher/paper-draft.md
- Date: 2025-02-19
- Assumes: surface-tilt-gives-schwarzschild
- Retracted by: energy-conservation-derivation (2025-02-20)
- Nogood: Poisson gives tan(theta) ~ 1/r^2 but Schwarzschild needs sin^2(theta) ~ 1/r
